systemcomposer.profile.Profile.description: define all stereotypes and properties used throughout the BMS model.

prototypes.description: Properties are:CAN_ID (hex), messagePeriod_ms, DLC_bytes, signalEncoding, ASIL_Level
properties defined are :supplyVoltage (V)//mostly that powers electronics, powerConsumption_mW, operatingTempMin,operatingTempMax
properties to be defined:updateRate_Hz, algorithmType, estimationError_pct, inputDependencies
Properties defined are :samplingFrequency_Hz, accuracy, sensorType, redundancyLevel
